name: Minamoto no Yoshitsune
overview: The chronicles of the life of Minamoto no Yoshitsune (1159 - May 17th, 1189). He was a late Heian and early Kamakura general of the Minamoto clan of Japan. Yoshitsune was the ninth son of Minamoto no Yoshitomo. His older brother Minamoto no Yoritomo founded the Kamakura shogunate.

trailers.title: 【1966年大河ドラマ 源義経】のオープニングをフリー素材だけで作ってみた
